name: architekt-wnetrz-worker
description: Cloudflare Worker backend dla aplikacji Architekt Wnętrz (Claude API + Gemini + D1 + R2)

scripts.db:reset:local: wrangler d1 execute architekt-wnetrz --local --command "DROP TABLE IF EXISTS projects; DROP TABLE IF EXISTS rooms; DROP TABLE IF EXISTS messages; DROP TABLE IF EXISTS decisions; DROP TABLE IF EXISTS renders; DROP TABLE IF EXISTS expenses; DROP TABLE IF EXISTS shopping_items; DROP TABLE IF EXISTS notes; DROP TABLE IF EXISTS d1_migrations;"
